# ToolSchemaRole enumeration

The schema slot being validated: governs the root-`type` rule (spec §16.4).

```csharp
public enum ToolSchemaRole
```

## Values

| name | value | description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Input | `0` | A tool `inputSchema`: the root `type` MUST be `"object"` (R-16.4-d). |
| Output | `1` | A tool `outputSchema`: the root `type` is unrestricted (R-16.4-e). |
